name: copilot-extension
description: Companion extension for copilot-instructions-template — profile management, extension sync, and MCP lifecycle tools for GitHub Copilot agents.

asafelobotomy.profileName.description: Name of the active VS Code profile for this workspace. Set per-profile to enable profile detection by Copilot agents.

languageModelTools.name: asafelobotomy_get_active_profile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Detect the active VS Code profile in the current window.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the name of the active VS Code profile for the current workspace. Uses the asafelobotomy.profileName setting. Returns empty string if not configured.

languageModelTools.name: asafelobotomy_list_profiles
languageModelTools.userDescription: List all known VS Code profiles from configuration.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns an array of profile names configured in the asafelobotomy.knownProfiles setting. Profiles are registered when ensure_repo_profile is called.

languageModelTools.name: asafelobotomy_get_workspace_profile_association
languageModelTools.userDescription: Check if this workspace has a profile binding.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the profile name associated with the current workspace, or null if no association exists. Reads from asafelobotomy.profileName in workspace settings.

languageModelTools.name: asafelobotomy_ensure_repo_profile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create and/or switch to a repo-specific VS Code profile.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Opens the current workspace in a named VS Code profile using 'code . --profile <name>'. If the profile does not exist, VS Code creates it automatically. Sets asafelobotomy.profileName in workspace settings.

profileName.description: The profile name to create or switch to. Convention: use the repo or folder name.

languageModelTools.name: asafelobotomy_get_installed_extensions
languageModelTools.userDescription: List all installed VS Code extensions with version info.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns an array of installed extensions with id and version. Uses the VS Code extensions API for accurate profile-aware enumeration.

languageModelTools.name: asafelobotomy_sync_extensions_with_recommendations
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Compares installed extensions against .vscode/extensions.json. Returns three lists: missing (recommended but not installed), extra (installed but not recommended), and matched (both installed and recommended).

languageModelTools.name: asafelobotomy_get_mcp_status
languageModelTools.userDescription: Check the health status of configured MCP servers.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Reads .vscode/mcp.json and reports each configured MCP server with its type (stdio/sse), command, and whether the extension's MCP provider is active. Use this to diagnose MCP server issues.

languageModelTools.name: asafelobotomy_restart_mcp_server
languageModelTools.userDescription: Trigger a restart of MCP servers by re-resolving definitions.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fires the onDidChangeMcpServerDefinitions event, causing VS Code to re-resolve all MCP server definitions from this provider. This effectively restarts servers whose definitions are managed by this extension. Use when an MCP server appears to be unresponsive.
